steps.subject: Garage door installs for your {city} builds
steps.body:
Hi {first_name},

I'm Tal with Goldman's Garage Door Repair. We do garage door installations for builders in {city} and the surrounding area — Clopay, Amarr, and Wayne Dalton.

I know the last thing you need is a sub holding up your CO. Here's how we keep your projects on schedule:

- We show up on the day we say we will — no excuses
- Warranty is handled directly through us, not your office
- Volume pricing when you're running multiple builds

If you're looking for a reliable garage door installer who won't slow down your timeline, I'd love to chat for a few minutes.

Tal Goldman
Goldman's Garage Door Repair
{phone}

steps.subject: Re: Garage door installs for your {city} builds
steps.body:
Hey {first_name},

Following up on my note about garage door installs. Figured I'd share a bit more about how we work with builders.

We carry all the major lines — Clopay, Amarr, Wayne Dalton — so your buyers have options at every price point. We handle the warranty calls directly, so your team never gets pulled into a callback six months after closing.

Most of the builders we work with in {county} send us the plans and we spec the doors out, quote it, and schedule install around your timeline. Pretty turnkey.

Worth a five-minute call to see if we're a fit?

Tal
{phone}

steps.subject: Volume pricing for your garage door installs
steps.body:
Hi {first_name},

Quick note — if {company_name} is doing multiple homes this year, we offer volume pricing that drops significantly once you're past three or four installs.

A few builders we work with just keep us as their go-to for every project. Saves them from getting quotes every time, and the pricing is locked in for the year.

Happy to put a number on it if you can give me a rough idea of your build volume. No pressure either way.

Tal Goldman
Goldman's Garage Door Repair
{phone}

steps.subject: Standing offer from Goldman's, {first_name}
steps.body:
Hey {first_name},

I won't keep filling your inbox — I know you've got builds to run. Just wanted to leave this as an open offer.

Whenever you need a garage door installer who shows up on time and doesn't hold up your CO, give me a call. We stock the major brands, handle warranty direct, and our volume pricing is hard to beat.

Save my number for next time.

Tal Goldman
Goldman's Garage Door Repair
{phone}

notes: Send from MI number for MI leads, NC number for NC leads. Especially strong for Triangle NC where new construction is booming.
